commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Manual review is needed because the PR still has a P1 Telegram message-delivery/privacy blocker and external live proof must come from a real repaired setup.; Needs attention: No supply-chain change was found, but the patch still has a Telegram privacy/message-delivery concern because disabled-progress internal status can remain visible.; Review finding: [P1] Include disabled tool-progress config in the force... (sha=8d6a0623fcc92739b924a7bf6f833a308b869899)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a `forceSuppressToolProgressMessages` reply option and wires Telegram plus the shared reply dispatcher to force default tool-progress suppression for some Telegram streaming states.

PR surface: Source +6. Total +6 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level reproduction is high confidence: the docs promise disabled Telegram tool-progress hides status lines, while the PR force predicate ignores that explicit config when `answerLane.stream` is absent. I did not run a fresh live Telegram repro at the current head.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Manual review is needed because the PR still has a P1 Telegram message-delivery/privacy blocker and external live proof must come from a real repaired setup.
